_comment: These thresholds are a CI regression floor, not a production target.
CI runs against the storefront with the SMMTA-NEXT API stubbed → the
catalogue read returns empty, no real product images load, every run
is cold (no warm caches, no service-worker reuse). Lighthouse
Performance is sensitive to all three.
The real production target (per Prompt 13) is Performance >= 0.95
against the live storefront with real catalogue + CDN-cached images.
Bumping these CI thresholds upward is fine as the empty-state score
improves; for now the floors below are set ~5pts under the current
observed score so a regression of more than that fails the build.
